text: For any county not wholly included within a city, the provisions of this article and expenditures made hereunder shall be deemed a county purpose and charge.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 43. Traffic Safety Boards
##### § 1677 — County purpose and charges

For any county not wholly included within a city, the provisions of this article and expenditures made hereunder shall be deemed a county purpose and charge.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
